prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约12943→13005→11234→13498→13924名。2023年曾明显前移至11234名，但2024–2025年连续两年后移，2025年基准 约13924名，近2年累计后移约2690名，呈波动中后移趋势；该校在江西省物理类招生计划：2021年60人、2022年61人、2023年63人、2024年68人、2025年67人、 2026年71人。2026年较2025年扩招4人（增幅约6%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字倾向于增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国药科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国 大学排名2026年第88名（2025年第86名），排名稳定在80–90区间，属全国中上游水平；2025年高考周期内该校出现师德师风负面舆情（教师被指性骚扰学生） ，评价为偏负面，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度总排名第90位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等偏低，未出现高热关注信号；未见明显投档断档记录；药学为A+学科（全国顶尖），中药学相关学科实力突出。该校核心优势集中在药学、中药学、生物制药等方向，对有志于医药行业的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于江苏省南京市（非本省），在江西省物理类招生计划占比较小（约67–71人），属跨省招生；无显著地域偏好信号；药学类、临床医学等医药相关专业社会热度持续偏高（2024–2026年均为推荐/高热推荐），报考意愿较强；江西省2026年普通高考总人数约474900人，较2025年总人数（ 约472480人）略有增加，其中物理类估算约267844人（较2025年266425人增加约1419人），考生规模小幅扩大，竞争略增。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13924名、20 26年扩招4人（增幅约6%）使竞争加剧、江西省物理类考生小幅增加、声誉偏负面轻微抑制报考热度、药学A+学科持续吸引考生等多重因素，结合声誉 与考生规模做小幅修正后，预测2026年物理类最低位次约14373名，区间13873–14873名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 12943 → 13005 → 11234 → 13498 → 13924. In 2023, there was a notable forward shift to 11234, but in 2024–2025, it shifted backward for two consecutive years. The 2025 baseline is about 13924, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2690 over the past two years, showing a fluctuating backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province: 60 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 68 in 2024, 67 in 2025, and 71 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of 4 students (an increase of about 6%), which slightly intensifies competition, tending to increase ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Pharmaceutical University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 88th (85th in 2025), stable in the 80–90 range, at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics (a teacher was accused of sexual harassment of students), rated as somewhat negative, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranks 90th overall, rated as 'average,' with medium-low short video exposure and no high-heat attention signals. No significant gaps in admission files were observed. Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top nationally), and Traditional Chinese Pharmacy-related disciplines are outstanding. The university's core strengths lie in Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals, etc., strongly attracting candidates interested in the pharmaceutical industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province (not local to Jiangxi). Its enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi is relatively small (about 67–71 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. No significant regional preference signals. Pharmacy, Clinical Medicine, and other pharmaceutical-related majors continue to have high social popularity (recommended/highly recommended from 2024 to 2026), with strong application willingness. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi general college entrance examination is about 474,900, a slight increase from about 472,480 in 2025. Among them, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 267,844 (an increase of about 1,419 from 266,425 in 2025), with a slight expansion in candidate scale and slightly increased competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13924, the 2026 expansion of 4 students (about 6% increase) intensifying competition, a slight increase in Jiangxi Physics Category candidates, a slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing application enthusiasm, and the continuous attraction of the A+ Pharmacy discipline, after minor adjustments based on reputation and candidate scale, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is about 14373, with a range of 13873–14873.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 14373, range 13873–14873. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Biopharmaceuticals, Clinical Pharmacy, Pharmacy Category) as the main direction. For Tier 1 majors (Outstanding Pharmacist Experimental Class, Top Innovation Class), a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range (about 13000 or less) is needed to attempt. Tier 3 majors (Traditional Chinese Pharmacy Category, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category, Pharmaceutical Administration, etc.) can serve as safety choices. The A+ Pharmacy discipline is outstanding, so it is recommended to prioritize major directions closely related to the core of Pharmacy.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国药科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年 第88名，属全国中上游水平，但该校以药学为核心，文科专业非其优势方向；2025年高考周期内出现师德师风负面舆情，评价偏负面，可能轻微抑制报考热度；抖音热度总排名第90位，评价"一般"，未出现高热关注；未见投档断档记录；药学A+为该校核心优势，但历史类招生专业（经济管理试验班、英语）与药学A+学 科无直接关联，学科优势对文科考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类仅设经济管理试验班（医药方向）和英语（医药方向）两个专业，经济管理类社会热度分化观望 ，英语类一般观望，均非高热专业；江西省2026年历史类考生估算约207056人（较2025年206055人增加约1001人），考生规模小幅扩大。该校位于江苏省南京市，在江西省历史类招生计划极少（约10–11人），属跨省招生；无显著地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2887名、2026 年扩招1人（增幅10%）使竞争加剧、历史类考生小幅增加、声誉偏负面轻微抑制、文科专业非该校优势方向等因素，结合专业热度与考生规模做小幅修 正后，预测2026年历史类最低位次约3040名，区间2540–3540名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 2214 → 2396 → 2900 → 2706 → 2887. Overall, there is a fluctuating backward trend. In 2023, it moved back to 2900, in 2024 it slightly moved forward to 2706, and in 2025 it moved back again to 2887, with a cumulative backward shift of about 673 positions over the past 5 years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi Province: 4 students in 2021, 5 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 10 in 2025, and 11 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 1 student (a 10% increase), which slightly intensifies competition, and the ranking numbers tend to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Pharmaceutical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. However, the university focuses on pharmacy, and its liberal arts programs are not its strengths. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics emerged, with generally negative evaluations, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranks 90th overall, with a rating of 'average,' and no high attention was observed. No records of enrollment gaps were found. Pharmacy (A+) is the university's core strength, but the History Category enrollment majors (Economic Management Experimental Class, English) are not directly related to the A+ pharmacy discipline, limiting the appeal of the university's disciplinary advantages to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category only offers two majors: Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) and English (Pharmaceutical Direction). The social popularity of economic management is divided and wait-and-see, while English is generally wait-and-see; neither is a highly popular major. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Jiangxi Province is about 207,056 (an increase of about 1,001 from 206,055 in 2025), indicating a slight expansion in candidate scale. The university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, and has a very small enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi Province (about 10–11 students), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. No significant regional preference signals were observed.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2887, the 2026 enrollment increase of 1 student (10% increase) intensifying competition, a slight increase in History Category candidates, a slightly negative reputation suppressing interest, and the fact that liberal arts majors are not the university's strength, combined with minor adjustments for major popularity and candidate scale, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 3040, with a range of 2540–3540.

History Category only offers two majors: Economic Management Experimental Class and English. In 2025, the admission rankings were the same (both 2887), with no significant tier differences. Candidates within the predicted ranking range can apply, and it is recommended to choose based on personal interest. The Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) has a higher correlation with the university's pharmaceutical characteristics, while English (Pharmaceutical Direction) is suitable for candidates interested in the intersection of language and pharmacy.
